panels.text: Migration of the mailboxes has been fully completed. Issues with the email forwarding is being addresses. Temporal solution has been implemented by Stefan. Awaiting feedback from TR for long-term solution.  Distribution lists have been recreated by Service Desk Next phase: OneDrive migration to be kicked-off in August. Scheduled for   O365 migration plan:

List of the business systems under review     [ Open ] PyCharm licenses - Approved by Naveen, purchased and allocated [ Closed ] Figma licenses - Purchased and allocated [ Closed ] Postman licenses in progress (Awaiting feedback from Barry)  [ Open ] 4CRisk space - Created [ Closed ] DNS migration - 1st part completed, 2nd part scheduled for 22nd July [ Open ] Replace the existing 4CRisk OpenAI account and Gemini API integrations - Dipak’s team is currently testing the OpenAI 5.1 model in AI Foundry. Some of the models previously used through the 4CRisk OpenAI account have been deprecated in the CUBE AI Foundry environment. Testing is still ongoing in the development environment, and, subject to successful results, deployment to production is planned for next week. ETA 31st July [ Open ]
Mary Leung’s and Melissa Pezzotti’s TR devices have been returned. Agreed with TR to keep Daniel’s laptop by the end of the TSA.
